rulings.Case Title: IN THE MATTER OF THE LEW FAMILY TRUST, DATED OCTOBER 25, 1989 TRUST
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Demurrer And Demurrer To Kenneth Lews Amended Probate Petition
rulings.Rulings: Respondent's demurrer under CCP §430.10(c) is overruled. Although a judgment in either action may give rise to collateral estoppel, the causes of action are not the same and adjudication of one action would not give rise to res judicata or claim preclusion of the second action. However, since Respondent seeks only to stay this proceeding per the demurrer, the Court will treat this as a "request" to abate the petition pursuant to Probate Code § 854: "Respondent Moria Fong requests that Petitioner Kenneth Lew's amended petition be abated pending resolution of a related civil action filed March 3, 2017 (CGC-17-557385) [¿]" (Respondent's Memorandum of Points and Authorities in Support of Demurrer, at 2:4-5). The parties are ordered to appear to address the request to abate per Probate Code § 854.
